# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: enable-sidecar-admin
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  meshConfig:
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
  components:
    pilot:
      k8s:
        overlays:
        - apiVersion: apps/v1
          kind: Deployment
          name: istiod
          patches:
          - path: spec.template.spec.containers.[name:discovery].env[-1]
            value:
              name: ISTIO_AGENT_ENABLE_ADMIN_ACCESS_LOG
              value: "true"
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-istio-sidecar-admin-from-debug
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          istio-sidecar-admin-debug: "true"
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 15000
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: istio-sidecar-admin-debug
  labels:
    istio-sidecar-admin-debug: "true"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
  name: sidecar-admin-debug-proxy
  namespace: istio-sidecar-admin-debug
  labels:
    app: sidecar-admin-debug-proxy
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: sidecar-admin-debug-proxy
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: sidecar-admin-debug-proxy
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      hostNetwork: true
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirstWithHostNet
      containers:
      - name: socat
        image: alpine/socat:1.7.4.4
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 65532
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          capabilities:
            drop: ["ALL"]
        args:
        - -d
        - -d
        - TCP-LISTEN:15000,fork,reuseaddr
        - TCP:127.0.0.1:15000
        ports:
        - name: envoy-admin
          containerPort: 15000
          hostPort: 15000
          protocol: TCP
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 0
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: sidecar-admin-debug
  namespace: istio-sidecar-admin-debug
spec:
  selector:
    app: sidecar-admin-debug-proxy
  ports:
  - name: envoy-admin
    port: 15000
    targetPort: 15000
    protocol: TCP
